title: lomaria australis
intro: Lomaria australis, also known as the Austral fern or the New Zealand button fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lomaria australis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Maori medicine for its healing properties.
